ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Mar-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gilbert Y. Jay, Esq. for Carole Reba Kelly Chenier (Petitioner).
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 1, 2016 is admitted to probate. Carole Reba Kelly Chenier is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for January 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Choi. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Continued To Jan-09-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay, in court, for and with Carole R.K. Chenier, Petitioner.

Counsel reports as to the efforts made to search for Phyllis Kelly. Counsel points to the will stating that Phyllis was disinherited. The court advises of the invalidity of that provision in the will and that counsel will need to show the court that additional efforts have been made to locate Phyllis and offers counsel the suggestion of using a paid online service for additional search.

The Petition is continued to Jan-09-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
